metaDescription: Enhance the safety and reliability of your electrical systems with Carelabs Indonesia's Relay Coordination Study services. Our experts perform comprehensive analyses to determine optimal protective device settings, ensuring prompt and selective fault isolation in compliance with IEEE standards.

paragraphs: Isolate faults, protect equipment, and stay compliant with Carelabs’ meticulous protective device coordination study in Indonesia.
Keep the power on even with electrical faults happening in the system. Ensure faster recovery from these faults with Carelabs’ relay coordination study services for Indonesian facilities.
At Carelabs, we follow a comprehensive support framework for ensuring the results that clients desire. We guarantee you get the best value for the investment.
Carelabs’ team has the technical expertise in using advanced technology like ETAP to generate accurate results. With simulations and recommendations, you get more than just a report.
We can bridge the compliance gaps with the right knowledge of local as well as global standards like PLN standards, IEEE, and IEC.

Carelabs uses the ETAP software suite for protection coordination, offering intuitive TCC plotting, simulations, and compliance with standards like IEC, IEEE, and Indonesian codes for relay coordination. Know how it can help you in perfecting your protective relays.
Protecting critical devices from cascading faults requires comprehensive and accurate analysis. From nodes to major assets, our relay coordination study in Indonesia covers it all.
A relay coordination study includes data collection, system modeling, various fault condition simulations, Time-Current Characteristic (TCC) plots, and recommendations to improve relay settings.
Short circuits, earth faults, overloads, phase defects, etc, are some of the faults that a proper coordination among relays can protect from.
Yes, we can help you with engineering support, detailed documentation, and inspection services. We help your team understand and maintain the coordination settings long-term.
